query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ad_proposal_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `brandId` int NOT NULL,
  `version` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `proposalContent` text NOT NULL,
  `totalGmv` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalImpressions` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `adValue` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalValue` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalAdCost` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `avgRoas` decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT '0',
  `totalLivestreams` int DEFAULT 0,
  `avgSalesPerLive` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `avgDuration` int DEFAULT 0,
  `productsCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `activeContractsCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `topProducts` json,
  `status` enum('draft', 'submitted', 'approved', 'rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdByName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `ad_proposal_history_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
